synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50066 Oracle Linux 10 image-builder bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50066
description:
[45-1.0.1]
- Bump to v45 [JIRA: OLDIS-50164]
- v43 to include merged BIB code
- Fix anaconda-iso mTLS key extraction
- Bump osbuild/images to 0.231.0
- Merge upstream spec file
- Refactor all existing Oracle patches to accomodate version bump [JIRA: OLDIS-50154]
- Obsolete bootc-image-builder package
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50066

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50066.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
image-builder-45-1.0.1.el10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
image-builder-45-1.0.1.el10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/image-builder-45-1.0.1.el10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[45-1.0.1]
- Bump to v45 [JIRA: OLDIS-50164]
- v43 to include merged BIB code
- Fix anaconda-iso mTLS key extraction
- Bump osbuild/images to 0.231.0
- Merge upstream spec file
- Refactor all existing Oracle patches to accomodate version bump [JIRA: OLDIS-50154]
- Obsolete bootc-image-builder package
